---
title: "Edward Chick"
description: "Data Analyst etc."
format: html
about:
    template: trestles
    links:
        - icon: linkedin
          text: LinkedIn
          url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/edward-chick-8ba753372
        - icon: github
          text: Github
          url: https://github.com/rusty-cogburn
        - text: "{{< fa envelope >}} Email"
          url: mailto:edward.chick@pm.me
---
